changes.before: No. The weakness lived in the turn itself, the instant when the blade had to be both things at once.
changes.after: The weakness lived in the turn itself, the instant when the blade had to be both things at once.

changes.before: The corner of her mouth kicked once.
No neat corpse-word for it. None of Kel'Thuzad's pretty dead language.
What remained was the pair who had heard the turn in the blade and lived.
On the way back the wind only ground at lashes and whitened the dragon bones until sky and earth seemed cut from the same pale ruin.
changes.after: On the way back the wind only ground at lashes and whitened the dragon bones until sky and earth were one pale ruin.
His mouth tightened. Fear showed clear enough.

changes.before: The sort of corridor never built for princes.
There is a turn in it.
changes.after: It opens for an instant between taking and throwing.

changes.before: Sylvanas sat beside her through most of the second night, close enough for the thing to be said aloud and tested.
changes.after: Sylvanas sat beside her through most of the second night, close enough for Jaina to say the sequence aloud and test it.

changes.before: Catch the breath with frost. Drive through it with arcane force. Then fire, before it closed its hand again.
changes.after: Freeze the turn with frost. Arcane through the gap. Then fire before it closes.
